description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic and Greek/Coptic numerals. The dating is likely 15th- or 16th- century based on the paleography. Some of the names mentioned are, Yiṣḥaq Kohen, Yaʿaqov Jamīla, and possibly "al-Yahūd al-Ṣafadī" (of Safed). The word "qamīṣ" (shirt) appears in many of the entries.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בGreek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
